Ntc And Motion For Order Imposing Terminating Sanction Against All Defts By Striking Their Answer And Entering Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:


Appearance:
Merrill G. Emerick, Esq., for Madlyn Motta, Plaintiff/Moving Party
Vladie P. Viltman, Esq., for Yevgeny Dubinsky, Defendant/Opposing Party

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopte with modification: Trustee's Motion For Order Imposing Terminating Sanctions Against All Defendants By Striking Their Answer And Entering Default Judgment Against Defendant, or alternatively, Imposing Issue and/or Evidence Sanctions And Imposing Monetary Sanctions is denied as it seeks terminating, issue, and/or evidentiary sanctions. Defendants are ordered to complete their discovery responses and to verify those responses no later than October 9, 2007. Monetary sanctions are imposed against Defendants, jointly and severally in the amount of $1,040, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.

Modification: to make completion and verification of responses by October 1, 2007. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Imposing Issue And/Or Evidence Sanction Against All Defts And Imposing Monetary Sanction Against All Defts And Their Counsel, Vladislav Viltman For Failing To Obey Order Comeplling Responses To Discovery Requests; Adn Declaration
Off Calendar Aug-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Dennis T. Soto, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Madlyn E. Motta
Vladie P.Viltman, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party: Yevgeny Dubinsky

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Plaintiff Madlyn Motta's Motion For Order Imposing Issue And/Or Evidence Sanctions And For Monetary Sanctions Against All Defendants For Failing To Obey Order Compelling Responses To Discovery Requests is granted as it seeks additional monetary sanctions. Issue and/or evidence sanctions are denied. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $790 are granted against Defendants' counsel, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.

MODIFICATION:
Respond by August 10, 2007.
Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff'S Interrogatories And Inspection Demands; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Madlyn E. Motta's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories and Inspection Demands is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendants Yevgeny Dubinsky; Sam Dubinsky; Dan Dubinsky; Gene Agranovsky; Tophill Builders, Inc.; and ACB, Inc. are ordered to respond to Plaintiff's Special and Form Interrogatories and Inspection Demands within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendants' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendants in the amount of $540, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
